commit.message:
fix(portal): replace prompt() login with inline form + URL token support

The browser prompt() for portal token was getting blocked/dismissed,
leaving the portal stuck at "connecting..." forever.

New auth flow:
- Inline login form with password input + Sign In button
- Validates token against /api/snapshot before storing
- Shows error message on invalid token
- Also accepts ?token=xxx URL parameter (stores + cleans URL)
- On 401, shows login form instead of calling prompt()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add thorough enrichment: deeper scraping, re-enrich button, batch cron

Three improvements to email discovery for leads:

1. Enhanced scraper depth: scrapers now try up to 6 pages per org
   (homepage + contact/about/staff/board/team/etc.) instead of 2-3.
   Self-hosted Firecrawl is free so no credit concern.

2. Re-enrich button: individual leads with missing emails now show
   a retry button (spinning arrow) in the leads table and preview
   sheet. Calls POST /api/leads/[id]/enrich.

3. Batch cron endpoint: GET /api/cron/enrich processes up to 50
   needsEnrichment leads per run, retrying the full scrape pipeline.
   Secured with CRON_SECRET.

Also flipped enrichment order: Firecrawl first (cleaner markdown),
HTTP scraper as fallback.

commit.message:
feat: add dynoproactive.py — autonomous autofix scanner

New `dynos proactive scan --root .` command that:
- Detects recurring audit findings from retrospectives (>50% rate)
- Checks dependency vulnerabilities (pip-audit/npm audit)
- Finds dead code via Python AST (unused imports, unreferenced functions)
- Detects architectural drift against gold standard patterns

Risk-based routing:
- Low/medium: git worktree → claude CLI fix → PR via gh
- High/critical: GitHub issue via gh for human review

Multi-level dedup prevents re-processing same findings. Max 2 retries
per finding, then permanently suppressed. Graceful degradation when
gh/claude/pip-audit missing. All output as JSON to stdout.

Wired into `dynos local start --autofix` daemon cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove scroll indicator from hero section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add holdings snapshot upload for Weekly Return Attribution

Users can now upload a Fidelity Portfolio Positions CSV for a specific
Friday. That snapshot overrides the reconstructed holdings weights when
computing the Weekly Return Attribution tables (Absolute + Excess) for
that specific week only. Nothing else (returns, Sharpe, Factor Exposure
cards, Weekly Theme Attribution, etc.) is affected.

portfolio.py
- HOLDINGS_SNAPSHOT_DIR under DATA_DIR (survives redeploys)
- parse_fidelity_positions_csv(): handles Fidelity's trailing-comma
  column shift via index_col=False, skips SPAXX / Pending activity,
  keeps SPY
- save_holdings_snapshot / list_holdings_snapshots /
  load_holdings_snapshot / delete_holdings_snapshot

app.py
- New "Upload Historical Holdings Snapshot" section in the Upload tab
  with sub-fund selector, Friday date picker (validates day-of-week),
  file uploader, parsed preview, and an Existing Snapshots list with
  delete buttons
- Weekly Return Attribution block refactored into a reusable renderer.
  When snapshots exist for a sub-fund it renders one block per snapshot
  (newest first) with betas recomputed from that week's holdings.
  Falls back to the existing "latest reconstructed week" behavior when
  no snapshots are uploaded.

Fix stress test: apply impact as % of NAV, not holdings cost

weighted average impact % across holdings and applies it to actual
fund NAV. No fund can lose more than its NAV.

Calibrate stress test to realistic PE drawdowns (20-40% worst case)

produces ~25-35% portfolio NAV decline (consistent with 2008 GFC).
Reduced cross-sector spillover from 20% to 5%.

commit.message:
feat: 新增 Overflow（溢层）词条 — 暴击→叠层的桥梁

从遗物 crit_overflow 的概念下放为词条，作为暴击类词条：
- 提供 10% 基础暴击率
- 暴击时随机选择 posRel 范围内 1 个��层类技能 +N 层
- 初始 N=3，每级 +1（3→4→5→6）
- 权重 high（6-10），归入暴击类别

这是暴击系统→叠层系统的正式桥梁词条：
暴击 build 的玩家可以通过 Overflow 为邻居的叠层技能加速，
叠层 build 的玩家可以混入暴击词条获得额外叠层来源。

commit.message:
Simplify config to global-only with setup overlay and integration tests (#92)

Remove workspace-level config entirely — single global config at
~/.minicode/ with precedence: agent.config.json < .env < shell env vars.

Auto-create ~/.minicode/ and starter config on first run. Empty model
triggers a setup flow: CLI exits with instructions, web UI shows an
overlay that tells the user exactly what's missing and suggests the
model dropdown. Overlay dismisses immediately when a model is selected.

AgentBridge gracefully handles missing model client so `minicode serve`
always starts even when not fully configured.

Fix OPENROUTER_API_KEY as the recommended var for OpenRouter users
(avoids collision with OPENAI_API_KEY set for other tools). Clean up
README, .env.example, and SDK error messages for consistency.

Add 46 integration tests covering the full config resolution chain,
env var precedence, setup validation, API status endpoint, and
realistic user scenarios (OpenRouter, LM Studio, Anthropic, fresh
install).

fix: prevent particle clustering — replace gravity with random drift (#116)

* config: increase welcome grant from 5 to 50 Leafs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: replace center gravity with random drift to prevent particle clustering

Particles were converging to a single point because center attraction
(0.0002 * distance) combined with velocity damping (0.975x) created an
inescapable sink. Replaced with 2% per-frame random nudge that keeps
particles alive without clustering. Removed CENTER_X/Y/ZONE constants
and the center-zone web line drawing (dead code without center point).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Match 改为观察邻居间配对（而非与自身比较）

之前与自身stacks比较，自身增长太快导致几乎不可能匹配。
改为检查范围内任意两个邻居之间是否叠层相同（不含自身），
Match 作为"观察者"角色——邻居同步时获得额外叠层。
质变·入局：自身 stacks 也参与配对检查。

commit.message:
feat: Parity/Prime 改为累计效果，Match 改为叠层类词条

Parity: 奇数叠层累积产出加成，偶数叠层累积暴击率（每关重置）
  之前：仅当前层为奇/偶时生效
  现在：每次奇/偶触发都永久累积（本关内），越打越强

Prime: 素数叠层累积大额加成（每关重置）
  之前：仅当前层为素数时生效
  现在：每经过一个素数层都累积加成

Match: 从纯数值词条改为叠层类词条
  当范围内邻居叠层数与自身相同时额外+1叠层
  叠满后自触发（可被 Pulse 联动触发）
  升级降低间隔（3→2→1）
  加入 isStackingAffix 判定

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: robust local/published config switching in config install

- Always delete stale render Function packages before pushing new images,
  not just with --reload. Fixes ImagePullBackOff when local registry has
  a different digest than the previously installed Function.

- Fix config install --path naming: use org-repo (e.g. hops-ops-aws-secret-stack)
  instead of just repo name, matching published Configuration names.

- Fix Docker build cache corruption: replace multi-stage Dockerfile patching
  (FROM source AS src / COPY --from=src) with docker create + export approach.
  The old method broke when Docker's snapshot cache was stale for images loaded
  via docker load.

- When installing a published --version, clean up local install artifacts:
  delete stale render Functions, local ImageConfig rewrites, and inactive
  ConfigurationRevisions pointing at the local registry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Point Firecrawl clients at self-hosted instance

Read FIRECRAWL_API_URL env var to route scrape/search requests
through our Railway-hosted Firecrawl instead of the cloud API.
Falls back to cloud if env var is not set.
